description:
Rust staticlib crate that both JIT and AOT link against. Defines the stable C-ABI boundary between compiled fz code and the runtime.

Scope:
- Value representation at compiled-code boundaries: tagged 64-bit (NaN-box or tag-in-low-bits — decide in ticket). Scalars unboxed inside a function; boxed only when crossing into runtime/builtins or interpreter.
- Atom table: interned strings, u32 ids, lookup + reverse-lookup for print.
- Builtin C-ABI surface: print, arithmetic helpers if any, panic/abort with fz-formatted error.
- No GC: heap allocation deferred to .11. Runtime panics if asked to allocate.

Out: lists, maps, strings, bitstrings — all blocked on .11.

Verification: standalone Rust tests calling the C-ABI surface directly.
title: Runtime staticlib + Value ABI
